title: Block Fruits
description: Blox fruit-based mod with sea beast and two demonic fruits, it has structures totally in survival and fun, hope you like it.
body:
![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6ffe63a6aa5a27c3d492f3826a82c206a8df0f0.png)
Blox fruit-based mod with sea beast and two demonic fruits, it has structures totally in survival and fun, hope you like it.

 **📥Installation guide**

This mod requires the forge and it's Just put it in windows and just put it in the mods folder there in .minecraft

**Features of the mod**

1. 2 fruits from blox fruits, flame and Giro
2. Floating Structure Spawning Fruits
3. Two Classes, Marine and Pirate
4. The Marine Class has 1 3D Sword and 16 loaves of bread
5. The pirate class has the same thing as the marine class
6. The mod features a Sea Beast

**Why would you like to download it**

- To help the mod have more versions
- To make me more excited to make the models more beautiful
